purpose: Lifecycle metric schema for Orin NX EIS evaluation. Metrics are layered so agents can use redundant evidence without mixing hard gates, diagnostic signals, and future calibration work.
source_principles: Objective metrics are proxy signals and must be paired with side-by-side visual review.
Hard degradation gates protect against unacceptable output even if stability metrics improve.
General IQA metrics are diagnostic until calibrated against Orin EIS human review.
Performance metrics support resume claims only when platform_label=jetson and same-input semantics are frozen.

metrics.definition: 1 - crop_ratio
metrics.notes: Crop over 15% violates the current formal boundary.

metrics.definition: Near-black connected components touching image boundary; p95 and consecutive frames are used.
metrics.notes: Continuous or edge-connected black border remains a manual veto even if p95 is low.

metrics.definition: original residual_pose_energy / stabilized residual_pose_energy after intent-trajectory removal
metrics.notes: A stability proxy. It does not override visual veto or scene role.

metrics.definition: 1 - stabilized residual_trans_std / original residual_trans_std
metrics.notes: Residual image-motion improvement proxy.

metrics.definition: Improvement of the largest 5% normalized pose second-derivative magnitudes
metrics.notes: Smoothness non-regression gate. High-risk challenge clips may report this separately from hard degradation gates.

metrics.definition: Production-style reading that separates hard crop/black gates, stability, smoothness, and scenario role
metrics.notes: Primary machine-readable acceptance summary, but still requires visual review.

metrics.definition: 95th percentile global affine translation magnitude
metrics.notes: Helps identify high-motion challenge clips.

metrics.definition: 95th percentile local residual normalized by global motion
metrics.notes: High value suggests local motion, foreground, parallax, or weak global model fit.

metrics.definition: Row-band residual variation proxy
metrics.notes: Helps flag rolling-shutter-like or spatially variant motion risk.

metrics.definition: Energy ratio in 2.5-5Hz vertical motion band
metrics.notes: Helps flag running/high-frequency motion scenes.

metrics.definition: normal_candidate, global_model_risk, or challenge_degrade
metrics.notes: Routes clips into main/challenge/diagnostic use. It is not a quality score.

metrics.definition: Mean Laplacian variance over sampled frames
metrics.notes: Sharpness proxy; can be fooled by noise and ringing.

metrics.definition: Mean Sobel-gradient energy over sampled frames
metrics.notes: Sharpness/edge proxy; diagnostic only.

metrics.definition: Variant Laplacian mean divided by raw Laplacian mean
metrics.notes: Used to explain crop/interpolation/sharpen trade-offs, not a hard gate.

metrics.definition: PSNR, SSIM, MS-SSIM, VIF, FSIM, LPIPS, DISTS, CLIP/DINO-like features, Visual Noise, Ringing
metrics.notes: Reference docs support these as IQA diagnostics, but they must be calibrated against Orin EIS human review before becoming gates.

metrics.definition: 95th percentile absolute scale delta from full affine fit
metrics.notes: High values may indicate zoom/breathing/local deformation risk.

metrics.definition: 95th percentile singular-value anisotropy delta
metrics.notes: Proxy for non-uniform scale/shear-like distortion.

metrics.definition: 95th percentile Frobenius norm of affine Gram matrix deviation
metrics.notes: Diagnostic for local pull or shape distortion risk.

metrics.definition: Average motion-estimation module latency per frame
metrics.notes: Only counts as resume/project performance evidence with platform_label=jetson.

metrics.definition: Average warp/crop/output module latency per frame
metrics.notes: Must use same input and frozen output semantics.

metrics.definition: End-to-end wall time for the run
metrics.notes: Windows timing is development evidence only.

metrics.definition: Evidence package platform label
metrics.notes: windows_simulation is only harness self-test.

layers.notes: Manual veto overrides objective metric pass. Store labels in human_review.csv when evidence is reviewed.

metric_adoption_rules.rule: No new hard gate without calibration
metric_adoption_rules.detail: A diagnostic metric must first be compared against human side-by-side review on enough Orin EIS samples.

metric_adoption_rules.rule: No headline claim from diagnostic sets
metric_adoption_rules.detail: Diagnostic and challenge sets explain boundaries; they do not define the main success rate.

metric_adoption_rules.rule: No performance claim without platform label
metric_adoption_rules.detail: Performance numbers must include platform_label=jetson and same-input frozen config.
Every quality claim needs side-by-side review evidence or an explicit manual-review pending status.
